zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Sheehan 16GGM於1453年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾時，她的父親John Sheehan 17GGF29歲，母親Isabel Heath24歲。她於1470年與Sir Richard Rugge 16GGF在英國史洛普爾艾勒斯莫結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1547年在她的家鄉享年94歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾阿爾林加姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Sheehan 16GGM于1453年出生在英国英格兰史洛普爾时，她的父亲John Sheehan 17GGF29岁，母亲Isabel Heath24岁。她于1470年与Sir Richard Rugge 16GGF在英国史洛普爾艾勒斯莫结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1547年在她的家乡享年94岁，埋葬在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾阿爾林加姆。

nameMeanings.name: Sheehan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Aileen, Rourke, Ciaran, Kiera, Kieran, Siobhan, Brigid, Donal, Eamonn, Ethna, Finbarr.

Irish (Cork): shortened form of O'Sheehan, an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Síodhacháin ‘descendant of Síodhachán’, a personal name representing a diminutive of síodhach ‘peaceful’, the same word as sítheach. Compare Sheehy .

variants.name: Shahan
meanings: Muslim (Indian subcontinent): from a personal name based on the Persian word shāhān ‘kings’, plural of Shah 2. Shāhān Shāh ‘King of Kings’ was a title used by royalty in Iran before the revolution of 1979.

variants.name: Sheehy
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Aileen, Aisling, Brigid, Declan, Egan, Eoin, Finbar, Ronan.

Irish (Limerick and Kerry): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Síthigh, ‘descendant of Sítheach’, or Mac Síthigh ‘son of Sítheach’, a form of the Irish personal name Síodhach ‘peaceful’, from the adjective sítheach ‘peaceful’ or ‘other worldly’ (see Sheehan ). The noun síth, from which this adjective derives, means basically ‘settlement’, hence both ‘peace’ and ‘place inhabited by other world beings’. This name was established in Ireland from the early 14th century, when a branch of the Scottish McDonnells, descended from Sítheach, great-grandson of Domhnaill, settled in the country.

variants.name: Sheahan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Clancy, Eamonn, Niall.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Sheehan 16GGM was born in 1453, in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Sheehan 17GGF, was 29 and her mother, Isabel Heath, was 24. She married Sir Richard Rugge 16GGF in 1470, in Ellesmere, Shropshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1547, in her hometown, at the age of 94, and was buried in Arlingham, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Sheehan 16GGM est née en 1453, à Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Sheehan 17GGF, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Isabel Heath, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Richard Rugge 16GGF en 1470, à Ellesmere, Shropshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1547, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 94 ans, et a été enterrée à Arlingham, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Sheehan 16GGM 1453 in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Sheehan 17GGF 29 und ihre Mutter Isabel Heath 24. Sie hat 1470 in Ellesmere, Shropshire, England Sir Richard Rugge 16GGF geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1547 im Alter von 94 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Arlingham, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Sheehan 16GGM è nata il nel 1453 nel Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Sheehan 17GGF, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Isabel Heath, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Sir Richard Rugge 16GGF nel 1470, nel Ellesmere, Shropshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1547, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 94 anni, e fu sepolta a Arlingham, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Sheehan 16GGMが1453年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアで生まれた時，父John Sheehan 17GGFは29歳，母Isabel Heathは24歳であった。1470年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアエレスメアでSir Richard Rugge 16GGFと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1547年に故郷で94歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアアルリンガムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Sheehan 16GGM(이)가 1453년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Sheehan 17GGF(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel Heath(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1470년 영국 슈럽실르 엘레스머에서 Sir Richard Rugge 16GGF(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1547년 그녀의 고향에서 94세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 알링함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Sheehan 16GGM nasceu em 1453, em Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Sheehan 17GGF, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Heath, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Richard Rugge 16GGF em 1470, em Ellesmere, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1547, em sua cidade natal, com 94 anos, e foi sepultada em Arlingham, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Sheehan 16GGM родилась в 1453 г. в местности шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Sheehan 17GGF было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Heath, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Richard Rugge 16GGF в 1470 г. в местности эллесмир, шропшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1547 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 94 лет и была похоронена в местности арлингхам, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Sheehan 16GGM nació en 1453, en Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Sheehan 17GGF, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Isabel Heath, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Sir Richard Rugge 16GGF en 1470, en Ellesmere, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1547, en su pueblo, a la edad de 94 años, y fue sepultada en Arlingham, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
